data.title: Too many notification on stupidness
data.content: I am so tired of the amount of notifications I get to “continue your streak” or something else. I just want some fun notifications of a motivational quote but this app is so obsessed with making sure you “keep your streak” “ Last chance before you lose your streak!” “Hurry now before your streak freezes again”  “you only have one day left before you lose your streak! Tap now for reminders” and those are just a few examples I have received all in one day. This app has changed so many times over the years and not for the better,  I’m to the point of deleting it now because I’m tired of all these notifications about my “streak” when all I wanted was some cute quotes to pop up on my phone like how they were doing years ago

data.title: Over 100 days…laughs, tears and eye rolls
data.content: My highest streak has been 120-something and even if it doesn’t change my day/mindset or I don’t really believe it that day to the point where I won’t bother to scroll, I will say I do feel like I’ve truly accomplished something when I continue a streak. Some days I read it silently honestly just to tell myself I’ve read it…other days oh man, it hits me and I’m called to end up reading it five times aloud to myself in tears while the words hit me in the gut while SOMETHING (i.e. a passed love one or the universe in general) knew I needed to hear them. 100% worth the few bucks a year!

data.title: It’s ok
data.content:
I found the reminders … stressful.
5 times a day is way too much 

I keep changing the reminders in settings … but they seem to change back?
I reduced the notifications to once a day, successfully.. except streak reminder started happening at 7am, which is a time I would never choose my self, bc I am never ever awake at such an ungodly hour, I changed to to 730pm, then I noticed I was getting it at 12am.. also another annoying time..
Tried to change it a few different days- still changes back- do I watched it today, changed it to 8pm, made sure to click the tick, wait, go out of reminders, back in.. ok.. still 8pm.. out then in again- 12am!
Tried making  an all new one. Let’s see if that works. I can’t really be bothered emailing monkey key or what ever .
Much easier to delete the Ap.

data.author: suzanneh64

data.title: I almost never write reviews on apps
data.content: … but honestly. I had to try something to change my daily mindset and now here I am. I’ve always heard that affirmations were good for your psyche. I’m a huge mental and emotional health advocate, as most of us here probably are. I’ve been told and read many years that SPEAKING your affirmations make a difference. It’s also part of various ancient cultures and ideologies rooted back in early human linguistics and consciousness. So I tried it. I put the widget on my lock screen and updated it to refresh hourly, and I speak them out loud every time I look at my phone for the time or unlock it for use. I didn’t FEEL an instant change, but over the last few weeks, I feel lighter, more focused, more in control of myself and more in tune with my reality. If I could give 20 stars I would. For what I know of the connections of ancient linguistics and consciousness ideologies, this app is perfect. Absolutely perfect.
data.author: WifeyVasquez

data.title: A beautiful reminder
data.content:
I love I Am. I have been using it for years. 
It’s a nice app to have on my phone to be reminded of the small things in life that make all the difference. 
I love my little reminders and positive affirmations. 
However my latest affirmations haven’t felt very intentional or there has been some sort of shift because sentences like “I am still here” or “it’s okay if today was just survival. That counts”. Don’t sound like affirmations to me 🫠
They shift all the time though and maybe it’s picking up the energy of my environment. Because I never noticed them being more on the negative side in the desert until I came to the city 🙃

Needless to say that was not what happened. I just now saw the toggle that I have to turn on myself to be reminded before trail ends. And I also didn’t know Apple sends a pending charge 24 hrs before the trial ends so they are already trying to charge me before the 3 day trial is up.

it is *really* Worth the subscription!!

I do not see that anywhere, I have been looking for hours now. I don’t want to delete the app but I might have to because it goes off in the middle of class
data.author: haiaienend

data.title: Was My Favorite App
data.content: I used to love this app so much. In fact I used  more than once a day most of the time. The free version was great. When I did have the money, I got a subscription, and it was even better. Unfortunately, I fell on hard times (when you would need this app the most) and had to cancel my subscription. The free version now doesn’t let you change your theme or anything else without a screen popping up to subscribe. The widget doesn’t match what you see when you click on it and I loved that feature because I used to favorite from there. I wish I could say I would be subscribing again someday, but because I basically lost everything I built in the past three years of subscribing, just because I can’t afford it is very disheartening. I’ve lost enough already and it may sound silly but this is the one thing I counted on every day.

data.title: App restarts everytime I open it
data.content: I love the affirmations and the notifications I get I have found to be super helpful. My problem with the app is everytime I go to open it, it restarts as if I’ve never used it before. It’s frustrating to have to continuously answer the same starting questions everyday and will likely stop using it because this.
data.author: sammi667

data.title: More Than Just an App ❤️
data.content: This app is honestly everything to me. It gives me so much more than confidence it gives me peace, motivation, reassurance, and a positive mindset every single day. The affirmations feel so personal and uplifting, especially during hard moments when I need encouragement the most. Since downloading this app, I’ve felt more empowered, focused, and emotionally stronger. It’s like having a daily reminder that I am worthy, beautiful, capable, and enough. I absolutely love the positivity this app brings into my life and I truly recommend it to anyone needing light, healing, and motivation. Five stars isn’t enough! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐😘

data.title: Wonderful App!!!
data.content: Amazing how they made this app free to use as long as you want to use it for without any force to watch an ad or some kind of payment for the service. I know for myself I’ve had some days where without being able to read an affirmation from the app that ends up simply popping up on your Home screen I would’ve fallen into old ways and just ruined my day more and more and possibly my entire life. Thank you so so much to the creators of this app! I would suggest supporting them if possible by subscribing to the full version as it has some extra little benefits for the user and customizes it more directly to your needs and is only pocket change coming out to just above 2$ a month.
